Home.heroDescription: At Naans Curries, every dish is a tribute to tradition and every moment is crafted for today. We bring together the warmth of Indian hospitality, the richness of timeless flavors, and the pace of modern life.

About.title: About Us
About.heroDescription: At Naans & Curries, we bring the richness of Indian cuisine to your table — fresh, fiery, and full of soul.
About.ourStoryP1: We bring authentic Indian flavors to your table. From traditional recipes passed down through generations to modern twists that surprise and delight, every dish tells a story of heritage and passion.
About.ourStoryP2: Our kitchen is where spices meet warmth, and every meal is crafted with care. We believe in honest ingredients, bold flavors, and the kind of hospitality that makes you feel at home.
About.storyTitle: The Tale of The Launch of Our First Eatery
About.storyDesc: Our first restaurant's history is based on passion, commitment, and common goals. It all began with a group of food enthusiasts who thought that extraordinary meals had the ability to transform people. We think that our restaurant brings flavor to life, and we treat our patrons more like honored guests than like business partners.
About.serviceTitle: Provide Unique Service For Your Special Day
About.serviceDesc: More than simply a restaurant, Naans & Curries is a culinary haven for gourmets seeking out exceptional eating experiences. At Naans & Curries, we think that a meal should be a memorable experience, and our skilled chefs are dedicated to producing imaginative and attractive cuisine.
About.locationsSliderTitle: Come and Visit One of Our Restaurants at Various Locations
About.locationsSliderDesc: With a commitment to exceptional service and a passion for culinary excellence, our locations are designed to make your dining experience memorable.
About.locationMomentumDesc: Experience the vibrant energy of Santa Ana at our Momentum Lindora location, where traditional spices meet modern elegance.
About.locationLincolnDesc: Nestled in San Jose, our Lincoln Plaza branch offers a sophisticated dining escape in the heart of the city.
About.locationPinaresDesc: A cozy and inviting space in San Jose perfect for family gatherings and intimate dinners.
About.locationEscazuDesc: The pinnacle of authentic Indian dining in Escazu, featuring our most signature dishes.
About.locationAlajuelaDesc: Bringing the soul of India to Alajuela with flavors that tell a story in every bite.
About.locationHerediaDesc: A haven for food lovers in Heredia, where tradition and innovation blend seamlessly.
About.locationCartagoDesc: Discover the heritage of spice in Cartago at our welcoming and family-friendly restaurant.
About.teamHeading: Exceptionally skilled world-class designers and visualizers.
About.teamDesc1: We are passionate about our work and its positive impact on our clients. With over 12 years of experience, we consistently deliver exceptional dining solutions.
About.teamDesc2: We aim to create practical culinary experiences tailored to projects of all sizes, meeting unique requirements. Our designs are crafted to perfectly align with your audience.
About.ourVisionDesc: To be the most loved Indian restaurant in the region, where every guest leaves with a memorable experience and a desire to return.
About.ourMissionDesc: To serve authentic, high-quality Indian cuisine in a warm and welcoming environment, honoring tradition while embracing innovation.
About.ourValuesDesc: Integrity in ingredients, respect for tradition, and a commitment to hospitality that makes everyone feel like family.
About.timeline2009Desc: We opened our first kitchen with a small menu and big dreams.
About.timeline2012Desc: Moved to a larger space and introduced our signature tasting menu.
About.timeline2016Desc: Brought Naans & Curries to a new neighborhood.
About.timeline2020Desc: Adapted with takeaway and delivery while keeping quality high.
About.timeline2024Desc: Three locations, countless memories, and the same passion for flavor.
About.ctaDescription: Join us for a meal that feels like home, with flavors that take you places.

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.subtitle: Since the beginning
OurStory.heading: Our Story
OurStory.intro: From a single dream to the table in front of you — this is the journey of Naans & Curries. Every dish we serve carries the weight of tradition and the spark of something new.
OurStory.beginningTitle: The Tale of Our First Eatery
OurStory.beginningDesc: Our first restaurant was built on passion, commitment, and a shared belief that extraordinary food could change the way people gather. It started with a small group of food lovers who knew that the best meals are the ones that bring people together.
OurStory.beginningDesc2: We opened our doors with a simple idea: treat every guest like family and every plate like a chance to tell a story. That idea still drives everything we do today.
OurStory.quote: We don't just serve food — we bring flavor to life.
OurStory.passionDesc: More than a restaurant, Naans & Curries is a place where tradition meets care. Our kitchen is where honest ingredients and bold flavors come together, and where every meal is crafted to make you feel at home. We believe in the power of a shared table and the magic of Indian hospitality.
OurStory.kitchenDesc: Our chefs bring generations of recipes and a love for innovation to every dish. From the first bite to the last, we aim to create moments that stay with you — and keep you coming back for more.
OurStory.todayDesc: We've grown, but our heart remains the same: authentic flavors, warm service, and a table ready for you. Come experience the difference.

TheSpirit.description: Good food, good service, a very pleasant dining experience.

SignatureMenu.weddingHeading: Exquisite Indian Wedding Catering in Costa Rica
SignatureMenu.weddingDesc: Naans & Curries offers authentic Indian cuisine and exceptional Private Chef & Events' Catering services in Costa Rica. From private gatherings to destination weddings, our experienced team caters to your needs.

AuthRestaurant.title: Authentic Indian Restaurant in San José & Tamarindo, Costa Rica
AuthRestaurant.p1: Welcome to Naans & Curries, the best Indian restaurant in Costa Rica, offering a wide variety of traditional Indian dishes with bold flavors and fresh ingredients. Located in San José and Tamarindo, we serve locals and tourists looking for authentic Indian food, whether you crave rich curries, tender tandoori, or satisfying vegetarian and vegan options. Whether you're in the mood for spicy butter chicken, paneer tikka, or garlic naan fresh from the tandoor, our chefs deliver a truly flavorful experience.
AuthRestaurant.p2: We also provide Indian food catering services across Costa Rica, perfect for weddings, corporate events, or private gatherings. Stop by our restaurants or order online for quick Indian curry delivery in Costa Rica.
AuthRestaurant.p3: Discover why our guests say we're the best Indian restaurant in San José. High-quality ethnic ingredients, skillful preparation by highly skilled chefs from India, and the process of serving from the foundation, but the experience at Naans & Curries is designed to extend beyond the plate. The fundamental formula of the Naans & Curries dishes is eternal. It consistently works according to the same script written centuries ago.

Catering.lindoraDesc: At Naans & Curries Lindora You can enjoy different ambiance; private saloon for group and events dining, green lawn fresh breeze seating, or cozy and relaxed sofa seating.
Catering.pinaresDesc: At Naans & Curries Pinares You can enjoy outdoor terrace seating with view of mountains or inside cozy seating for the cold evenings.
Catering.lincolnDesc: At Naans & Curries Lincoln Plaza Enjoy the contemporary Indian vibe. Breezy terrace or nature theme indoors, perfect for your mood.
Catering.nunciaturaDesc: At Naans & Curries Nunciatura enjoy a refined setting ideal for business lunches and special occasions in the heart of San José.
Catering.tamarindoDesc: At Naans & Curries Tamarindo experience beachside Indian cuisine with ocean breezes and a relaxed coastal vibe.
Catering.cocoDesc: At Naans & Curries Playas del Coco savor authentic flavors steps from the beach in a welcoming, family-friendly atmosphere.
Catering.jacoDesc: At Naans & Curries Jacó enjoy vibrant Indian flavors in a laid-back surf-town setting, perfect for post-beach dining.

detail.paragraph1: Color isn't just something people see — it invokes reactions in people. The key duty in architecture is to improve living conditions and comfort through spaces. When used effectively, colors can become powerful tools at an architect's disposal. They offer a form of non-verbal communication that tells people in a space how to feel and conveys something about what the space is used for.
detail.paragraph2: At Naans & Curries, we believe every dish tells a story. Our kitchen blends tradition with innovation, bringing you flavors that have traveled across generations. From the warmth of our tandoor to the careful balance of spices, each plate is crafted to create a memorable experience.
detail.subheading1: How Colors Influence People's Emotions in Space
detail.paragraph3: The same philosophy applies to our dining space. The ambiance, the aromas, and the presentation work together to create an experience that goes beyond taste. We invite you to explore our menu and discover the stories behind each recipe.

Menu.heroDescription: The food at Naans & Curries best describes itself in one word: diversity. Foodies will have no shortage of options, from our authentic traditional recipes to contemporary twists and delectable fare.
Menu.introDescription: We've meticulously created each flavor on our menu to entice your palate and leave you wanting more. Each meal is a work of art, combining the love of our talented chefs with the freshest ingredients.
Menu.breakfastDesc: Treat yourself to the perfect start to your day with our Breakfast Menu.
Menu.mainCourseDesc: Enjoy the pinnacle of culinary excellence with our Main Course Menu.
Menu.drinkDesc: Quench your thirst and lift your spirits with our Drinks Menu. From refreshing classic dishes to signature concoctions.
Menu.dessertDesc: Experience a sweet ending with our Ultimate Dessert. Each creation is a harmonious blend of decadence and artistry.

items.applePancakesDesc: The cake is served with sweet maple compote, corn cinnamon butter for greasing, and chicken sausage.
items.greekYogurtDesc: Greek yogurt, honey, mixed berries, granola.
items.classicBreakfastDesc: Two eggs (any style), bacon or sausage, hash browns, toast.
items.avocadoToastDesc: Sourdough bread, smashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, red onion, feta cheese, balsamic glaze.
items.pancakesWafflesDesc: Pasta style marinara pan sautéed and hot cheese.
items.chickenTeriyakiDesc: Chicken grilled and coated with soy sauce and flavored with sake, mirin, or sugar.
items.tandooriChickenDesc: Marinated in yogurt and spices and baked in a tandoor.
items.classicMenuDesc: Two eggs (any style), bacon or sausage, hash browns, toast.
items.chickenShawarmaDesc: Grilled chicken shawarma, hummus, mixed greens, tomatoes, and tahini sauce. Wrapped in a warm pita.
items.mediterraneanOmeletDesc: Three egg omelet, with spinach, tomatoes, onions, and feta cheese, served with a side of home fries.
items.tropicalSunsetDesc: Exotic fruit medley in a vibrant, thirst-quenching concoction.
items.berryBurstDesc: Antioxidant-packed berries blended into a silky-smooth smoothie.
items.springSideDesc: Whiskey vodka, fresh seasonal berries, fresh squeezed lemon juice, honey syrup & fresh mint.
items.mangoLassiDesc: Traditional yogurt-based drink blended with sweet mango pulp.
items.masalaChaiDesc: Aromatic spiced tea brewed with milk and a secret blend of herbs.
items.chocolateCakeDesc: Rich indulgence with layers of velvety chocolate goodness.
items.vanillaIceCreamDesc: Bourbon with a variety of flavor choice.
items.strawberryMuffinsDesc: The perfect balance between soft, moist muffins and the sweetness of fresh, sweet strawberries.
items.gulabJamunDesc: Soft, spongy milk solids soaked in cardamom-infused sugar syrup.
items.mangoCheesecakeDesc: Creamy cheesecake with a vibrant fresh mango puree swirl.
